ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component and its use cases */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component's datasheet */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the component's manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated component ID */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Ambient Operating Temperature) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "typ_value" TEXT /* Typical (nominal) value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., electrical, thermal, mechanical) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the parameter (e.g., ±1%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Volt, Degree Celsius) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit and its application */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit (e.g., V, °C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Resistors, Capacitors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category including typical components */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component ID */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, QA) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated component ID */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated parameter ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component/parameter */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, manager, QA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_revision_history" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated component ID */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the component */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made in this revision */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_revision_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated component ID */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the component (e.g., validated, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_validation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated component ID */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification (e.g., CE, UL) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_certifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
